name: watchbridge-sync
description: Free/open-source media data export, import, and sync workspace for IMDb, Letterboxd, TMDb, Trakt, Simkl, TV trackers and more.

scripts.test: corepack pnpm -r test && corepack pnpm test:operational
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm -r --sort lint && corepack pnpm check:workflow && corepack pnpm check:release-metadata && corepack pnpm check:package-contents && corepack pnpm check:web-security-headers && corepack pnpm check:configuration
scripts.check: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm smoke:production-api
